---
title: "Getting Started with rmdd"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with rmdd}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(rmdd)
```

`rmdd` is intended to support mammal taxonomic name resolution workflows based
on the Mammal Diversity Database.

```{r}
mdd_reference()
```
